text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Nooooo! I don't wanna!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking down the hallway when I suddenly
hear a loud, defiant cry.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I don't wanna do any extra classes! I can get good
test scores even without them!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wh-what do you want?! Are you gonna tell me I need extra classes just like my teacher?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Well, I don't WANNA! It shouldn't even be such a
big deal that I was late to class 'cause I was
practicing my magic!

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho! Come back to the class right now,
young lady!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wha?! She's coming! What should I do?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Like I said! I. Don't. Wannaaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, she's going to find me at this rate! I need
to find a way to...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Aha!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: SHHH! Be quiet! Just stand right there!

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text: Sweep Tosho! Where are you? Sweep Tosho!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Phew. She's gone.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehe! ♪ You're pretty useful as a wall, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You keep what happened here a secret, and I'll
make sure your job as a wall stays safe, eh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Seems like my "wall" days aren't over yet.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I-I was thinking that too! There's no way she can
outrun me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not long before I glimpse Sweep Tosho
through the windows, dashing away at top speed.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! That was a cinch! ♪ Let's see her try to
catch me now!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What's going on here?

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Air Groove! Am I glad to see you! This young
lady is trying to weasel her way out of attending
her supplementary classes.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh?! No way! No, no, noooo!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see. What a stroke of luck that you decided
to stop here.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Nooooo! I don't wanna! Let me go! LEMME
GOOO!
